name: speakai-mcp
description: Capture meetings, search thousands of recordings, run async voice and video surveys, create clips, and automate workflows — all from your AI assistant.

interface.shortDescription: Capture meetings, search thousands of recordings, run async voice and video surveys, create clips, and automate workflows — all from your AI assistant.
interface.longDescription:
Speak AI transcribes and analyzes your interviews, sales calls, research sessions, webinars, podcasts, and team meetings. This connector brings that library into your AI assistant — so instead of scrubbing hours of audio, you just ask.

Capture — Send a meeting assistant to Zoom, Google Meet, or Microsoft Teams. Upload audio, video, or text. Run async voice and video surveys with custom questions.

Analyze — Search and reason across thousands of recordings at once with citations. Chat with your library, save favorite prompts, and keep a full history. Pull decisions, action items, owners, risks, sentiment, themes, and exact quotes.

Act — Create clips, highlights, captions, notes, folders, fields, and embeds from chat. Chain steps with automations and webhooks: auto-tag new recordings, route insights to other tools, or run a custom prompt against every new upload.

Share & organize — Export answers, transcripts, captions, and clips. Generate embed links and shareable views. Bulk move media, update transcripts and speakers, and clone setups across teams.

Who it's for: researchers, revenue and customer-success teams, meeting-heavy operators, and media and content workflows — anyone who records conversations and wants to stop re-listening to find what matters.

Your recordings stay in your Speak AI workspace. The connector only queries them with the permissions you allow.
defaultPrompt: Use Speak AI to find the last 10 customer interviews that mention pricing, group the feedback by theme, and cite the source recordings.
Use Speak AI to summarize this week's team meetings into decisions, action items, owners, and unresolved risks.
Use Speak AI to pull exact customer quotes about onboarding friction from recent research calls and format them for a product brief.
Use Speak AI to analyze the latest sales calls and summarize objections, buying signals, next steps, and open questions.
Use Speak AI to find a strong 30-second highlight from the latest webinar, create a clip, and export captions.
